title: Experienced Food
description: Adds food for more experienced players
body:
This mod adds more food items for some of the more experienced players. For now this mod only adds baguettes crafted with three bread and carrot pieces that can be crafted with a single carrot. Also you can craft meat supreme with all of the cooked meats. And you can also make hamburgers with baguitte, mayonaise, salad, cheese, cooked beef and onions. You can also make carrot soup with carrots and a bowl. There is also three types of crates that you can craft More stuff will be released soon but for now I have only added these. These foods are balanced so baguettes are a little bit better than bread and carrot pieces are a little bit worse than carrots.

[![bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Fallen_World/MP_FallenWorld_promo.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/jalnyr?r=experiencedfoodmodrinth)
